UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF LYNN KIM'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AS AGAINST DEFENDANT IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SUSTAIN ITS BURDEN AND SHOW THAT DEFENDANTS' ACTION OR TACTIC WAS (1) TOTALLY AND COMPLETELY WITHOUT MERIT, MEASURED BY THE OBJECTIVE, "REASONABLE ATTORNEY" STANDARD, OR (2) MOTIVATED SOLELY BY AN INTENTION TO HARASS OR CAUSE UNNECESSARY DELAY, MEASURED BY A SUBJECTIVE STANDARD." WEISMAN V. BOWER (1987) 193 CAL.APP.3D 1231, 1237. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees As Against Deft
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF LYNN KIM's Motion For Attorneys Fees As Against Defendant is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden and show that defendants' action or tactic was (1) totally and completely without merit, measured by the objective, "reasonable attorney" standard, or (2) motivated solely by an intention to harass or cause unnecessary delay, measured by a subjective standard." Weisman v. Bower (1987) 193 Cal.App.3d 1231, 1237. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
